titleStmt.title: SII 37.211: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 211. (A.R. No. E 20 of 1939-40.) Guḍimūla (hamlet of Rāmēśvaram), Rajole Taluk, East Godavari District.

summary.p: Fourth pillar in the Rāmēśvara temple.
This is dated Śaka 1071, Simha Bṛihaspati, corresponding to 1149 A.D.

It records the gift of 50 inpaeḍlu for the maintenance of a perpetual lamp to the god Bōdhīśvara by Pinna Eṟṟapāpa, wife of Kāmi Nāyaka. Also refers the gift of three pandūmus land by Kōmma Bōya for the maintenance of a lamp.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī śakava¨rṣaṁbulu 1071 ṇḍagunēṁṭi siṁhabriha
spatihnimittaṁbunaṁ doppāka bōdhīśvara mahādēvaraku
kallagāpavi kāmināyaku peṁḍlamu vēlāna pinnaya
ṟṟapāpa peṭṭina nandāviṟakku diviyaku nittyamāneḍu ne
neyubōyaṁbeṭṭina yinpayeḍlu vebadi gācinēyi
vōyaṁgalavāṁḍu kāṭyapāṁgu koḍuku kommaya bōyu
rautu Iyyanaku doḍḍipaṭṭu muppaṁdumu nēla bhūmi A
khaṁḍamunaku Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamunaku
vāru svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdhara ṣa¨rṣṭi
ṁva¨rṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ . prōlabētu
ni vrālu .
Digital edition of SII 37.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
